---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(here)
library(readr)
library(tidyverse)
library(rsample)
library(ISLR)
library(caret)
ruta <- here("main", "data", "processed", "imdb_with_sentiment.csv")

data <- read.csv(ruta, sep = ",")

data <- data %>%
  mutate(Votes = as.numeric(gsub(",", "", Votes)),
         Review.Count = as.numeric(gsub(",", "", Review.Count)))

# data$Votes %>% as.numeric(gsub(",", "", data$Votes))

data %>% glimpse()
```
```{r}
data <- data %>%
  select(-c(Title, Year, Director, Genre, Cast, Description, Review.Title, Review, metascore_missing, Metascore, reviews_tokenizadas))

data %>% summary()
```
```{r}
data |> select(, Rating) |> cor()
```
```{r}
data$sentiment <- as.factor(data$sentiment)

dmy <-  dummyVars(" ~ sentiment", data = data)
data_2 <- data.frame(predict(dmy, newdata = data))

data <- cbind(data, data_2)
```

```{r}
data <- data %>% select(-sentiment)
data %>% glimpse()
```


```{r}
library(GGally)
data %>%
        ggpairs(progress = FALSE) +
        theme_minimal()
```
